overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing nighttime driving in heavy rain from inside an Audi. The driver navigates through urban streets and highway sections with active windshield wipers, following other vehicles before approaching and entering a tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with commercial buildings

events.description: overtaking a slower vehicle on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-slicked urban streets with windshield wipers active, maintaining steady speed behind traffic

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead with red taillights visible through rain

entered.detail: wet multi-lane asphalt surface reflecting streetlights
tall modern street lighting illuminating the roadway
multi-story commercial building with lit windows
green bushes and trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving through an urban arterial road at night in heavy rain. The windshield wipers sweep across the glass as the vehicle follows a sedan ahead. Commercial buildings line the left side while streetlights cast reflections on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete guardrails and overhead signage

events.description: transition from urban street to highway section with concrete barriers
passing under large overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while navigating through light traffic, passing under overhead signs

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead maintaining steady distance in the same lane

entered.detail: grey concrete barrier running along the left side of the highway
large metal overhead structure supporting road signs
tall metal lattice tower with power lines

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open highway environment with concrete guardrails replacing building facades. The vehicle passes under a large overhead sign gantry while power transmission towers become visible in the distance. Rain continues to fall heavily on the multi-lane road.

events.description: entering covered tunnel structure, transitioning from open air to enclosed space
lighting shifts to uniform artificial tunnel illumination as vehicle moves deeper inside

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the tunnel while following the vehicle ahead, transitioning from outdoor rain to sheltered roadway

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead entering tunnel with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel portal with road signs above
smooth concrete walls with embedded lighting fixtures
metal safety fencing along the tunnel approach

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a highway tunnel, transitioning from the rain-exposed highway to the sheltered interior. The tunnel entrance structure looms ahead with safety barriers lining the approach. Inside, the lighting becomes uniform and artificial, with smooth concrete walls replacing the open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a vehicle navigating a rain-soaked urban environment that eventually transitions into a sheltered highway tunnel. It begins on a city arterial road at night, where windshield wipers sweep across the glass as the car follows a sedan past illuminated commercial buildings and reflective wet asphalt. As the road opens up, the urban facades give way to a multi-lane highway flanked by concrete guardrails, passing under a large overhead sign gantry with power transmission towers appearing in the distance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle approaches a looming tunnel entrance, moving from the heavy rain and open sky toward the safety barriers of the portal. Finally, the camera enters the tunnel, where the environment transforms into a sheltered interior characterized by uniform artificial lighting and smooth concrete walls.
